---
title: "Jiaqi's Tech Notes"
page-layout: full
body-classes: notes-home
listing:
  contents: notes/*/index.qmd
  sort:
    - "date-modified desc"
    - "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields:
    - title
    - categories
    - date
    - date-modified
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const seriesPosts = [
    "notes/rl-r1-vs-k1.5/",
    "notes/policy-gradient-ppo-grpo/",
    "notes/kimi-k1.5-report/",
    "notes/llm-rl-baseline/"
  ];

  const cards = document.querySelectorAll(".notes-home .quarto-grid-item .post-contents");
  const makeSegment = (label, value) => {
    const segment = document.createElement("span");
    segment.className = "home-card-meta-segment";

    const labelNode = document.createElement("span");
    labelNode.className = "home-card-meta-label";
    labelNode.textContent = `${label}:`;

    const valueNode = document.createElement("span");
    valueNode.className = "home-card-meta-value";
    valueNode.textContent = value;

    segment.append(labelNode, valueNode);
    return segment;
  };

  for (const card of cards) {
    const title = card.querySelector(".listing-title");
    if (!title) continue;

    const categories = [...card.querySelectorAll(".listing-category")]
      .map((node) => node.textContent.trim())
      .filter(Boolean);
    const created = card.querySelector(".listing-date")?.textContent.trim() || "";
    const modified = card.querySelector(".card-other-values .date-modified")?.textContent.trim() || "";

    const meta = document.createElement("p");
    meta.className = "home-card-meta";
    meta.appendChild(makeSegment("Tags", categories.length ? categories.join(", ") : "-"));
    if (created) meta.appendChild(makeSegment("Created", created));
    if (modified) meta.appendChild(makeSegment("Modified", modified));

    for (const node of [...card.children]) {
      if (node !== title) node.remove();
    }
    card.appendChild(meta);
  }

  const grid = document.querySelector(".notes-home #listing-listing .grid");
  if (!grid) return;

  const seriesItems = seriesPosts
    .map((path, index) => {
      const link = [...grid.querySelectorAll(".quarto-grid-link")]
        .find((node) => node.getAttribute("href")?.includes(path));
      const item = link?.querySelector(".quarto-grid-item");
      const entry = link?.closest(".g-col-1");
      return entry && link && item ? { entry, link, item, index } : null;
    })
    .filter(Boolean);

  if (!seriesItems.length) return;

  const seriesBox = document.createElement("section");
  seriesBox.className = "home-series-box";
  seriesBox.setAttribute("aria-labelledby", "home-series-title");

  const seriesHeader = document.createElement("div");
  seriesHeader.className = "home-series-header";
  seriesHeader.innerHTML = `
    <p class="home-series-kicker">Series</p>
    <h2 id="home-series-title">RL for Large Language Models</h2>
    <p class="home-series-description">A four-part reading path covering DeepSeek R1, Kimi K1.5, policy-gradient methods, PPO, GRPO, and baselines.</p>
  `;

  const seriesList = document.createElement("div");
  seriesList.className = "home-series-list";

  for (const { entry, link, item, index } of seriesItems) {
    entry.classList.add("home-series-entry");
    link.classList.add("home-series-link");
    item.classList.add("home-series-item");
    item.style.setProperty("--series-index", `"${index + 1}"`);
    seriesList.appendChild(entry);
  }

  seriesBox.append(seriesHeader, seriesList);
  grid.prepend(seriesBox);

  const remainingEntries = [...grid.querySelectorAll(":scope > .g-col-1")];
  if (remainingEntries.length) {
    const standaloneHeader = document.createElement("div");
    standaloneHeader.className = "home-standalone-header";
    standaloneHeader.innerHTML = `
      <p class="home-series-kicker">Standalone Notes</p>
      <h2>Other Posts</h2>
    `;
    grid.insertBefore(standaloneHeader, remainingEntries[0]);
  }
});
</script>
```
